title: Ivy's Sound Garden
synopsis: Little Ivy discovers different sounds in her garden while counting from one to five, experiencing each noise as colorful shapes and patterns.

pages.text: One bee buzzes by Ivy's ear. Buzz! Buzz!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes stands in a garden with yellow wavy circles around a bee representing the buzzing sound
illustration.alt: Ivy listening to a bee with yellow sound waves

pages.text: Two birds chirp in the tree. Tweet! Tweet!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes looks up at two birds with blue musical notes and curved lines floating around them
illustration.alt: Ivy watching two birds with blue musical sound shapes

pages.text: Three frogs croak by the pond. Ribbit! Ribbit! Ribbit!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes near a pond with three frogs and green bouncing circles showing their croaking sounds
illustration.alt: Ivy by pond with three frogs and green sound bubbles

pages.text: Four leaves rustle in the wind. Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh! Whoosh!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes watching leaves with silvery swirling lines and spirals representing wind sounds
illustration.alt: Ivy watching leaves with silver wind sound swirls

pages.text: Five raindrops splash down. Pitter! Patter! Pitter! Patter! Pitter!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes in light rain with purple and blue dots cascading down representing raindrop sounds
illustration.alt: Ivy in rain with colorful sound dots falling

pages.text: Ivy claps her hands. What a wonderful sound garden!

illustration.description: Ivy with short dark brown bob with bangs, fair skin, big brown eyes clapping with rainbow starbursts around her hands amid all the garden sounds in colorful shapes
illustration.alt: Ivy clapping with rainbow sound bursts in her sound garden

metadata.illustrationStyle: sound made visible, wavy lines for music, jagged lines for crashes, dots for whispers, synesthesia inspired, seeing sound, color and shape for noise, vibration visual

questions.question: How many bees buzz by Ivy?
questions.explanation: One bee buzzes by Ivy in the garden.

questions.question: What sound do the frogs make?
How many raindrops splash down?
questions.explanation: Five raindrops splash down with pitter-patter sounds.
